form.label: CTI - AlienVault OTX Threat Intelligence
form.description: Threat Intelligence dashboard powered by AlienVault OTX

search.query: index=otx sourcetype="otx:pulse" earliest=0 | where adversary!="" | stats count by adversary | sort adversary

index=sysmon (EventCode=22 OR EventCode=3 OR EventCode=1 OR EventCode=7 OR EventCode=11) | eval indicator=case( EventCode=22, QueryName, EventCode=3, DestinationIp, true(), null() ) | eval hash=if(match(EventCode,"1|7|11"),lower(replace(Hashes,".*SHA256=([A-F0-9]+).*","\1")),null()) | eval ioc=coalesce(indicator,hash) | where isnotnull(ioc) | join type=inner ioc [ search index=otx sourcetype="otx:indicator" type=$ioc_type$ earliest=0 | eval indicator=lower(indicator) | rename indicator as ioc | dedup ioc | fields ioc ] | stats dc(host) as unique_hosts

index=sysmon (EventCode=22 OR EventCode=3 OR EventCode=1 OR EventCode=7 OR EventCode=11) | eval indicator=case( EventCode=22, QueryName, EventCode=3, DestinationIp, true(), null() ) | eval hash=if(match(EventCode,"1|7|11"),lower(replace(Hashes,".*SHA256=([A-F0-9]+).*","\1")),null()) | eval ioc=coalesce(indicator,hash) | where isnotnull(ioc) | join type=inner ioc [ search index=otx sourcetype="otx:indicator" type=$ioc_type$ earliest=0 | eval indicator=lower(indicator) | rename indicator as ioc | dedup ioc | fields ioc ] | stats dc(ioc) as total_hits

index=sysmon | eval technique_id=case( EventCode=1 AND match(Image,"powershell.exe|pwsh.exe|cmd.exe|wscript.exe|cscript.exe|mshta.exe"), "T1059", EventCode=8, "T1055", EventCode=11, "T1027", EventCode=13, "T1112", EventCode=22, "T1071", EventCode=3, "T1071", true(), null() ) | where isnotnull(technique_id) | join type=inner technique_id [ search index=otx sourcetype="otx:pulse" earliest=0 | mvexpand attack_ids{} | rename attack_ids{} as technique_id | where technique_id!="" AND technique_id!="null" | stats count as pulse_count by technique_id ] | stats count as sysmon_hits by technique_id | where sysmon_hits > 200 | stats count as critical_ttps

index=sysmon EventCode=3 | rename DestinationIp as indicator | join type=inner indicator [ search index=otx sourcetype="otx:indicator" type="IPv4" earliest=0 | where "$ioc_type$"="*" OR "$ioc_type$"="IPv4" | dedup indicator | fields indicator ] | stats dc(indicator) as count

index=sysmon EventCode=3 | rename DestinationIp as indicator | join type=inner indicator [ search index=otx sourcetype="otx:indicator" type="IPv4" earliest=0 | where "$ioc_type$"="*" OR "$ioc_type$"="IPv4" | dedup indicator | fields indicator ] | iplocation indicator | where Country!="" | stats dc(Country) as count

panel.title: OTX Threat Intel Hits - TTPs Active in Your Environment

search.query: index=sysmon | eval technique_id=case( EventCode=1 AND match(Image,"powershell.exe|pwsh.exe|cmd.exe|wscript.exe|cscript.exe|mshta.exe"), "T1059", EventCode=8, "T1055", EventCode=11, "T1027", EventCode=13, "T1112", EventCode=22, "T1071", EventCode=3, "T1071", true(), null() ) | where isnotnull(technique_id) | join type=left technique_id [ search index=otx sourcetype="otx:pulse" earliest=0 | mvexpand attack_ids{} | rename attack_ids{} as technique_id | where technique_id!="" AND technique_id!="null" | stats count as pulse_count values(name) as pulse_names values(adversary) as actors by technique_id ] | where isnotnull(pulse_count) | stats count as sysmon_hits max(_time) as last_seen first(pulse_names) as pulse_names first(actors) as actors by technique_id | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"), pulse_names=substr(pulse_names,1,50)."...", severity=case(sysmon_hits>200,"Critical",sysmon_hits>50,"High",sysmon_hits>10,"Medium",true(),"Low"), _sev_sort=case(severity="Critical","1",severity="High","2",severity="Medium","3",true(),"4") | sort _sev_sort - sysmon_hits | fields - _sev_sort | rename technique_id as "Technique ID" sysmon_hits as "Environment Hits" last_seen as "Last Seen" pulse_names as "OTX Pulse" actors as "Threat Actor" severity as "Severity"

index=sysmon EventCode=3 | rename DestinationIp as indicator | join type=inner indicator [ search index=otx sourcetype="otx:indicator" type="IPv4" earliest=0 | where "$ioc_type$"="*" OR "$ioc_type$"="IPv4" | dedup indicator | fields indicator ] | iplocation indicator | where isnotnull(lat) AND isnotnull(lon) | geostats latfield=lat longfield=lon count globallimit=0

index=sysmon EventCode=3 | rename DestinationIp as indicator | join type=inner indicator [ search index=otx sourcetype="otx:indicator" type="IPv4" earliest=0 | where "$ioc_type$"="*" OR "$ioc_type$"="IPv4" | dedup indicator | fields indicator ] | iplocation indicator | where Country!="" | stats count as hits dc(indicator) as unique_ips dc(host) as affected_hosts by Country | eval severity=case(hits>100,"Critical",hits>20,"High",hits>5,"Medium",true(),"Low"), _sev_sort=case(severity="Critical","1",severity="High","2",severity="Medium","3",true(),"4") | sort _sev_sort - hits | fields - _sev_sort | rename Country as "Country" hits as "Hits" unique_ips as "Unique IPs" affected_hosts as "Affected Hosts" severity as "Severity"

index=sysmon EventCode=3 | rename DestinationIp as indicator | join type=inner indicator [ search index=otx sourcetype="otx:indicator" type="IPv4" earliest=0 | where "$ioc_type$"="*" OR "$ioc_type$"="IPv4" | dedup indicator | fields indicator ] | iplocation indicator | join type=left indicator [ search index=otx sourcetype="otx:pulse" adversary=$threat_actor$ earliest=0 | stats values(adversary) as adversary by indicator ] | stats count as hits dc(host) as affected_hosts max(_time) as last_seen first(Country) as country first(City) as city first(adversary) as adversary by indicator | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"), adversary=if(isnull(adversary) OR adversary="","Unknown",adversary), location=if(city!="" AND city!="unknown",city.", ".country,country), severity=case(hits>100,"Critical",hits>20,"High",hits>5,"Medium",true(),"Low"), _sev_sort=case(severity="Critical","1",severity="High","2",severity="Medium","3",true(),"4") | sort _sev_sort - hits | fields - _sev_sort country city | rename indicator as "IP" hits as "Hits" affected_hosts as "Affected Hosts" last_seen as "Last Seen" location as "Location" adversary as "Threat Actor" severity as "Severity" | head 50

panel.title: OTX Malicious Domain Hits - Your Environment (Last 7 Days)

search.query: index=sysmon EventCode=22 | rename QueryName as indicator | join type=inner indicator [ search index=otx sourcetype="otx:indicator" type="domain" earliest=0 | where "$ioc_type$"="*" OR "$ioc_type$"="domain" | dedup indicator | fields indicator ] | eval Process=mvindex(split(Image,"\\"),-1), Time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M") | rename indicator as "Malicious Domain" host as "Host" | sort - _time | table Time "Malicious Domain" Host Process

panel.title: OTX Malicious File Hits - Your Environment

search.query: index=sysmon (EventCode=1 OR EventCode=7 OR EventCode=11) | rex field=Hashes "SHA256=(?<sha256>[A-F0-9]+)" | eval sha256=lower(sha256) | where isnotnull(sha256) AND sha256!="" AND NOT match(Image,"splunk") | join type=inner sha256 [ search index=otx sourcetype="otx:indicator" type="FileHash-SHA256" earliest=0 | where "$ioc_type$"="*" OR match("$ioc_type$","FileHash") | eval indicator=lower(indicator) | rename indicator as sha256 | dedup sha256 | fields sha256 ] | eval filename=mvindex(split(Image,"\\"),-1) | stats count as hits min(_time) as first_seen max(_time) as last_seen by sha256 host filename | eval first_seen=strftime(first_seen,"%Y-%m-%d"), last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%d"), sha256_short=substr(sha256,1,16)."...", severity=case(hits>50,"Critical",hits>20,"High",hits>5,"Medium",true(),"Low"), _sev_sort=case(severity="Critical","1",severity="High","2",severity="Medium","3",true(),"4") | sort _sev_sort - hits | fields - sha256 _sev_sort | rename sha256_short as "SHA256" filename as "File Name" host as "Host" hits as "Hits" first_seen as "First Seen" last_seen as "Last Seen" severity as "Severity" | table Severity "File Name" Host Hits "First Seen" "Last Seen" SHA256

index=otx sourcetype="otx:pulse" adversary=$threat_actor$ | mvexpand attack_ids{} | rename attack_ids{} as technique_id | where technique_id!="" AND technique_id!="null" | stats count by technique_id | sort - count | head 10

index=otx sourcetype="otx:pulse" adversary=$threat_actor$ | mvexpand attack_ids{} | rename attack_ids{} as technique_id | where technique_id!="" AND technique_id!="null" | stats min(_time) as first_seen count as pulse_count values(adversary) as adversary by technique_id | eval severity=case(pulse_count>20,"Critical",pulse_count>10,"High",pulse_count>5,"Medium",true(),"Low"), _sev_sort=case(severity="Critical","1",severity="High","2",severity="Medium","3",true(),"4"), first_seen=strftime(first_seen,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"), adversary=if(adversary="","Unknown",adversary) | sort _sev_sort - first_seen | fields - _sev_sort | rename technique_id as "Technique ID" first_seen as "First Seen" pulse_count as "Pulse Count" severity as "Severity" adversary as "Adversary"

panel.title: MITRE ATT&CK Framework - Active TTPs (Last 7 Days)

search.query: index=otx sourcetype="otx:pulse" earliest=0 | mvexpand attack_ids{} | rename attack_ids{} as technique_id | where technique_id!="" AND technique_id!="null" | eval tactic=case( match(technique_id,"T1595|T1592|T1589|T1590|T1591|T1596|T1597|T1598"), "01 - Reconnaissance", match(technique_id,"T1583|T1584|T1585|T1586|T1587|T1588|T1608"), "02 - Resource Development", match(technique_id,"T1189|T1190|T1191|T1192|T1193|T1194|T1195|T1196|T1197|T1199|T1200|T1566|T1078"), "03 - Initial Access", match(technique_id,"T1059|T1106|T1129|T1203|T1204|T1559|T1569"), "04 - Execution", match(technique_id,"T1037|T1053|T1078|T1098|T1133|T1136|T1137|T1176|T1197|T1205|T1505|T1525|T1543|T1546|T1547|T1548|T1554|T1556|T1574"), "05 - Persistence", match(technique_id,"T1055|T1134|T1484|T1548|T1611"), "06 - Privilege Escalation", match(technique_id,"T1006|T1014|T1027|T1036|T1055|T1070|T1078|T1112|T1127|T1140|T1197|T1202|T1205|T1207|T1211|T1216|T1218|T1220|T1221|T1222|T1484|T1497|T1548|T1553|T1562|T1564|T1574|T1578|T1600|T1601|T1610|T1612|T1620|T1622"), "07 - Defense Evasion", match(technique_id,"T1003|T1040|T1056|T1110|T1111|T1187|T1212|T1528|T1539|T1552|T1557|T1558|T1606"), "08 - Credential Access", match(technique_id,"T1007|T1010|T1012|T1016|T1018|T1033|T1040|T1046|T1049|T1057|T1069|T1082|T1083|T1087|T1120|T1124|T1135|T1201|T1217|T1482|T1497|T1518|T1538|T1580|T1613|T1614|T1615|T1619|T1622"), "09 - Discovery", match(technique_id,"T1021|T1072|T1080|T1091|T1210|T1534|T1550|T1563|T1570"), "10 - Lateral Movement", match(technique_id,"T1001|T1011|T1020|T1029|T1030|T1041|T1048|T1052|T1071|T1092|T1095|T1102|T1104|T1105|T1106|T1132|T1205|T1219|T1571|T1572|T1573|T1574"), "11 - Command and Control", match(technique_id,"T1020|T1030|T1041|T1048|T1052|T1567"), "12 - Exfiltration", match(technique_id,"T1485|T1486|T1489|T1490|T1491|T1495|T1496|T1498|T1499|T1531|T1561|T1565"), "13 - Impact", true(), "14 - Other" ) | stats values(technique_id) as techniques count as hits dc(adversary) as unique_actors by tactic | eval techniques=mvjoin(techniques,", ") | append [ | makeresults count=14 | streamstats count as row | eval tactic=mvindex(split("01 - Reconnaissance,02 - Resource Development,03 - Initial Access,04 - Execution,05 - Persistence,06 - Privilege Escalation,07 - Defense Evasion,08 - Credential Access,09 - Discovery,10 - Lateral Movement,11 - Command and Control,12 - Exfiltration,13 - Impact,14 - Other",","),row-1), techniques="No active TTPs", hits=0, unique_actors=0 | fields tactic techniques hits unique_actors ] | stats first(techniques) as techniques sum(hits) as hits max(unique_actors) as unique_actors by tactic | eval techniques=if(hits=0,"No active TTPs",techniques), severity=case(hits>50,"Critical",hits>20,"High",hits>5,"Medium",hits>0,"Low",true(),"None") | sort tactic | rename tactic as "Tactic" techniques as "Active Techniques" hits as "Total Hits" unique_actors as "Unique Actors" severity as "Severity"

panel.title: OTX Feed Health - Last Ingest Times

search.query: index=otx earliest=-24h | stats max(_time) as last_ingest_epoch count as total_events by sourcetype | eval last_ingest=strftime(last_ingest_epoch,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval age_minutes=round((now()-last_ingest_epoch)/60,1) | eval status=if(age_minutes < 90,"Healthy","Stale") | fields - last_ingest_epoch | rename sourcetype as "Source Type" last_ingest as "Last Ingest" total_events as "Events (24h)" age_minutes as "Minutes Since Last Ingest" status as "Status"
